item.name: Xty'iinbek Sleeper
item.description:
Named for its unusual habit of migrating all the way from the sea to hibernate at the bottom of this specific caldera.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This fish has vivid, colorful scales that scarcely ever see the light of day. It spends most of its adult life in the ocean, then returns to Xty'iinbek Tsoly to spawn.
